prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: character portrait. Story world: Dead Channel Protocol. Premise: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move.. Setting: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes. Threat presence: Root Administrator. Recurring motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Character portrait for Grid Operator Niko Saye, role SUSPECT. Traits: guarded, analytical. Response style: accusation=Defensive and selective.; threat=Withdraws and delays.; questioning=Provides partial truths first... Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller. Tone: GROUNDED. Immediate scene brief: Dead Channel Protocol - Grid Operator Niko Saye Portrait. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Create a realistic portrait with wardrobe, posture, facial tension, and environmental context that reveal personality and danger. Avoid floating-head composition. Frame as a prestige horror still, not concept art.
